description_long: This handgun features a robust black metal slide with a matte finish, complemented by a frame that displays a digital camouflage pattern. The grip panels are a deep brown, resembling wood or a textured polymer, and are contoured for ergonomic handling. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for finger placement and control. The barrel is short and integrated within the slide, with no visible threading or compensator, and the muzzle is slightly recessed. There are no visible manufacturer markings, engravings, or serial numbers on the slide, giving it a clean and utilitarian appearance. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile.
description: A compact black handgun with a digital camo frame, brown textured grip panels, and a matte metal slide. The design is clean and modern, with a flush magazine base and no visible slide markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black slide, digital camo frame, and brown grip panel with visible texturing.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle opening, rounded trigger guard, and the width of the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same black slide, camo frame, and brown grip, with the ejection port and controls less visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backstrap, grip contour, and the alignment of the slide and frame.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with a slight palm swell and features a deep brown color, resembling either stained wood or textured polymer. Its surface appears to have a subtle grain or stippling for enhanced grip, and the panels are inset into the frame, providing ergonomic support. There are no visible logos, finger grooves, or decorative embellishments, giving it a straightforward, functional appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth finish with no visible texturing or reinforcement, and lacks undercuts or squared-off edges. The design is conventional, prioritizing comfort and safety.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and fully enclosed within the slide, with a standard profile and no visible threading, porting, or compensator. The muzzle is slightly recessed, and the exterior finish matches the matte black of the slide. No external markings or special features are present.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is clean and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns apparent in any view.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and compact profile. There are no finger rests, flares, or visible logos, and the design is simple and utilitarian.
